label: Tell ministers: 1080 to Zero
consentNote: This MP-contact action remains in testing until Australian electorate matching, agriculture-minister target lists, consent language, delivery logs and exports pass review.
description: Postcode-based representative action asking federal, state and territory decision-makers to put a funded 1080 phase-out and final prohibition date in the renewed AAWS.
testGate: Current federal, state and territory agriculture minister offices verified by role before launch
Federal and state electorate matching tested for metropolitan, regional, remote and boundary addresses
Action Network custom targets and shapefile workflows tested against official AEC and state lookup tools
Messages sent to internal targets first, with separate delivery logs for each target type
Privacy notice, confirmation email, unsubscribe, suppression, export and deletion workflows documented
